w:r.w:t: 17 Implementation-Ready Prompts Based on All 47 Improvements
To Beat Amazon India & Flipkart — Paste Directly into Cursor AI / Claude Code
Product Cards | Trust Signals | Search | Mobile | Checkout | Performance | AI Features
Next.js 15 | React 19 | TypeScript | Tailwind CSS v4 | Zustand | React Query | Razorpay

Every prompt below is paste-ready into Cursor AI, Claude Code, or GitHub Copilot. Each one covers a specific improvement from the 47-item master list and includes exact file paths, complete TypeScript/React code, API endpoints, and expected impact.
Most critical — users cannot buy what they cannot see
1.1 Fix product card size, ratings, price, and cart button
Make product cards match Amazon quality — full upgrade
Fix ZENVY ProductCard component to match Amazon/Flipkart quality.
CURRENT PROBLEM: Product images are ~80px. Users cannot see products.
TARGET: Match Amazon standard - 220px images, full trust signals.
2. STAR RATINGS - add below product name:
3. PRICE BLOCK - large price with MRP strikethrough:
5. ADD TO CART BUTTON - always visible on mobile, hover on desktop:
className='w-full mt-2 py-2 text-sm font-medium bg-zenvy-500
6. WISHLIST HEART - absolute top-right of image:
className='absolute top-2 right-2 z-10 p-1.5 bg-white rounded-full
RESULT: Card matches Flipkart quality, surpasses it with AI deal score.
The #1 reason Amazon converts better than everyone
Add trust signal bar — free delivery, returns, secure payments
Add trust signal bar below ZENVY header to increase conversion.
EXPECTED IMPACT: +8-12% conversion rate (proven by A/B tests across
'X people viewing this now' — WebSocket backed social proof

export function ViewerCount({ variantId }: { variantId: string }) {
PLACE ON PDP: between stock status and Add to Cart button.
- Only show when count > 10 (no fake social proof)
- Count comes from real WebSocket backed by Redis HyperLogLog
- Update every 30 seconds to avoid flickering

export function SoldCounter({ soldCount }: { soldCount: number }) {
if (soldCount < 50) return null // only show when meaningful

RULE: Never fabricate these numbers. Always pull from real API:
soldCount: from ClickHouse analytics (orders last 24h per SKU)
Make AI features visible — users don't use what they can't see

Add mic and camera icons — make AI search discoverable

ADD INSIDE the search input container, right side:
className='w-full pl-9 pr-20 py-2.5 border rounded-lg

VISUAL SEARCH MODAL: opens camera or file picker,
sends image to POST /api/v1/search/visual { image: base64 },

endsAt: Date // deal end time from CMS/backend

75% of Indian e-commerce is mobile — this is not optional
